articles.title: About this blog
articles.description: Some additional details about the blog

articles.title: hello world
articles.contents:
I will be using this site as an exercise in writing / coding.
También escribiré algunas cosas en español, pero serán pocas cosas porque estoy viviendo en EE.UU. y necesito practicar mi inglés.
The purpose of this post is to help me figure out how to set up the blog in the first place. 1
More interesting stuff will be coming next.
I’ll also share some visualizations made with ggplot2.

A pie chart is just a stacked bar chart in a polar coordinate system.

show code
library(ggplot2)

df <- data.frame(type = c("mouth", "body"), size = c(4, 15))

g <- ggplot(df, aes(x = "", y = size, fill = type)) + 
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", show.legend = FALSE)

g





show code
g + coord_polar(theta = "y")





show code
g + coord_polar(theta = "y", start = 1) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("#FFD104", "#fefffc")) + 
    labs(title = "pacman") +
    theme_void()





I’m using the distill package to set this up.↩︎
